messages.text: On it. Error log: 'QueuePool limit overflow, max_overflow 0 current overflow 20'. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: Each cart with N items now opens N concurrent DB connections in inventory-servic.... Rolling back.
